subcodes.first_line: O namesake and remembrance of Dhul-Qarnayn, think not that thou art forgotten or hast faded from memory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار و همنام ذوالقرنین همچو گمان منما که فراموش شدی و یا از خاطر رفتی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @business; financial; property matters
